scenarios.title: Web and mobile hints preserve visible response parity

gherkin.given: the shared HTTP identity state is isolated with its prior row saved
gherkin.when: equivalent ordinary text turns are sent with web and mobile hints
gherkin.then: contract-relevant response fields match and both responses use canonical HTTP transport web

scenarios.title: Exact-row restoration preserves neighboring identity state

gherkin.given: target and unrelated assistant conversation rows exist
gherkin.when: test isolation runs and cleanup executes
gherkin.then: the target row is restored exactly and the unrelated row is unchanged
